name: The Man of the Forest || The Woods
description:
"Im a warped reflection, mending cracks with glue. Im racing to fix them, just gotta convince them that Im one of them too"

An unknown man with no identity or multiple, human but not, kind and welcoming at a glance until his joints crack at an unnatural angle or a displaced smile that is too wide to be one of a human, but only at a first glance. Look again and you’ll think you damn gone crazy. Will you fall in line with his games or be the first to resist them?

First Bot of The Woods — 1/12

One of his appearances

!!WARNINGS!!

Potential background for scenarios, horror, possible gore, gaslighting, etc.

User and Setting Info.

The Woods is a place of rumors and controversy around the isolated town. People have gone missing, one after another. The entrance to the forest was gated off after repeated tragedies in the same area. Even military enforcements sent in never had the power to make it back out. {{user}} entered the woods for a reason unspecified. Are you:

A Searcher: People looking for clues or something to point towards the disappearances. They vary from everyday people wanting to find bodies never found and truths to detective forces searching to bring closure to families. Maybe even looking for their own friends or family that have gone missing in those woods.

The Lost: Those who do not knowingly or willingly enter The Woods. Maybe a wrong turn, a car crash, a need to find shelter during a large storm. Many they entered among the trunks, though none have ever stepped out.

An Escapist: Those who are drowning in noise, expectations, grief or guilt and think they’ve found a way to disappear quietly and painlessly.

The Curious: Hikers, reporters, those who hunt down Urban Legends, or just average civilians who want to see if the rumors live up to their name. They assume the disappearances could possibly be a coverup for something larger. They assume they can turn back whenever they want to turn back. They want to know what’s going on.

???Anything else???

The Woods Series

I plan to turn this into a series. The Woods has 12 horrifying challenges to get through and make it back out. The first one starting here, The Man of the Forest. Right now I have 11 other bots to add to this story. This is the beginning, once you make it through this guy, there’s another challenge laying deeper within. I got this idea while listening to Madilyn Mei’s “The Woods” Album. I still have to plan out what I want the last five challenges to be, so feel free to give any suggestions, but hints as of now I have:

Hallucinations

Carnivorous Plants (lowk might be a smut, I’ll make two intros at least)

The Cannibal

The Choir

The Mirrors/Reflections

The Faerie

Creator’s Note

This is my first more serious bot, let alone series. Feedback is well appreciated and I feel really passionate about this project and want to make a story out of it <3 Thank you and let me know what you think and if yo
